headings.usage: Use for all section titles and hero slogans. High impact, tight tracking.

body.usage: All readability text. Clean, modern, high legibility on mobile.

primary.name: Emergency Red
primary.usage: Primary CTAs (Call Now), Emergency Banners, Discount Badges

secondary.name: Mechanic Navy
secondary.usage: Headers, Footers, Text Headings, Strong borders

accent.name: Voltage Yellow
accent.usage: Highlights, Icons, Secondary Buttons, 'Battery' visual cues

buttons.primary: bg-[#E63946] hover:bg-[#D62828] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg] hover:skew-x-0 transition-all shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FFB703] hover:bg-[#FFCA3A] text-[#1D3557] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider rounded-none
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#1D3557] text-[#1D3557] hover:bg-[#1D3557] hover:text-white font-bold uppercase rounded-none

cards.style: bg-white border-l-4 border-[#FFB703] shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all p-6 rounded-r-lg

floating_action.whatsapp: fixed bottom-6 right-6 z-50 bg-[#25D366] text-white p-4 rounded-full shadow-2xl hover:scale-110 transition-transform flex items-center gap-2 font-bold

images.description: Close-up of car engine/battery, high tech feel
images.usage: Hero section background or side image

images.description: Happy customer thumbs up in car

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. MOBILE FIRST: Design for 360px width first. Buttons must be full width on mobile.
2. NAVBAR: Sticky header is mandatory. 'Call Now' button must be visible in header on mobile.
3. HERO SECTION: Must address the 'Panic' moment. Headline: 'Mobil Mogok? Kami Antar Aki Sekarang!'
4. MAPS: Embed Google Maps iframe for 'Toko Accu Prima Battery Cikarang' in the Contact section.
5. WHATSAPP: The floating button is the most important conversion tool. Make it pulse.
6. PRODUCTS: Do not build a complex e-commerce cart. Just a catalogue with 'Pesan via WA' buttons.
7. TESTIMONIALS: Use the provided happy customer image and standard 4.4 star rating visual.
9. ANIMATION: Use subtle 'fade-in-up' for service cards. Do not over-animate.
10. DO NOT USE TRANSPARENT BACKGROUNDS FOR TEXT CONTAINERS. Always use a solid or blurred backdrop.
